description_long: This nightstand features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a slightly curved wooden top finished in a dark, textured wood grain. The body is painted in a distressed light gray, giving it an antique appearance. The front includes a single drawer with an ornate handle and a lower cabinet door adorned with decorative molding and a matching handle, as well as a visible keyhole and key. The sides are plain with recessed panels, while the back is constructed from a different, lighter wood with a simpler finish. The legs are elegantly curved, adding to the traditional aesthetic. Subtle carved details and flourishes are present along the lower front edge and around the door panel.
description: A vintage-style nightstand with a dark wood top, distressed gray body, ornate handles, and decorative carvings on curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate drawer, cabinet door with decorative molding, and curved legs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain recessed panel and the key protruding from the cabinet lock.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, lighter wood back panel with no decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain recessed panel and the key visible in the lock.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
